borough.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

building_age.as_of_policy: Set missing when year_built was ETL-imputed; train-fit imputation handles fallback.

building_class.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

days_since_2019_start.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

distance_to_center_km.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

gross_square_feet.as_of_policy: ETL-imputed values are reset to missing before model fitting; imputation is train-fit only.

h3_prior_median_ppsf.as_of_policy: Uses same-H3 historical PPSF strictly before the row sale/valuation date.

h3_prior_median_price.as_of_policy: Uses same-H3 sale prices strictly before the row sale/valuation date; never current/future target.

h3_prior_sale_count.as_of_policy: Uses same-H3 sales strictly before the row sale/valuation date.

month_cos.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

month_sin.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

neighborhood.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

property_segment.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

rate_regime_bucket.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

residential_units.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

total_units.as_of_policy: covered by model feature contract and forbidden target-derived allowlist

year_built.as_of_policy: ETL-imputed values are reset to missing before model fitting; imputation is train-fit only.

reference_policy.test_rows: training split rows only; holdout targets are never used
reference_policy.train_rows: expanding historical rows from the training split only
